default_assumptions: Mesh regions are geometry annotations, not optical observables.

adapter_compatibility.meep: preview metadata; real FDTD result requires Meep execution
adapter_compatibility.mpb: preview metadata only unless the observable is eigenmode/band-oriented
adapter_compatibility.gmsh: geometry/mesh annotation only; no optical observable computed by Gmsh alone
adapter_compatibility.elmer: FEM placeholder metadata; real result requires ElmerSolver execution
adapter_compatibility.optiland: ray/object/image metadata only unless ray tracing is explicitly run

notes: Maps to Gmsh physical groups / region annotations.
Source and monitor metadata are preview-only.
warnings: No optical field quantity is computed by mesh generation alone.
Monitor type is unknown; confirm observable before solver setup.
